# Simple test code for tool feature testing
# This creates a small Z80 binary with known patterns

# Code section
3E      # ld a,$42
42
C3      # jp $0010
10
00
CD      # call $0020
20
00
00      # nop
00      # nop
00      # nop

# Some data at 0010
48      # "Hello\0"
65
6C
6C
6F
00
00
00

# A procedure at 0020 (offset 0x18 in file)
21      # ld hl,$0010
10
00
C9      # ret

# More data for testing different dump modes at 0030
01
02
03
04
05
06
07
08
34      # words (little-endian): $1234, $5678
12
78
56
57      # "World!\0"
6F
72
6C
64
21
00

# Some UTF-16 data for testing 'u' command at 0050
41      # "ABC\0" in UTF-16LE
00
42
00
43
00
00
00
